setup.tip: Start every project with claude init to auto-generate a CLAUDE.md scaffold based on your repo.
Use claude --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 for quick boilerplate tasks — it's 10× faster and cheaper.
setup.example: claude --model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 "generate getters and setters for User.ts"

setup.tip: Authenticate once with OAuth and never worry about token rotation. Requires Pro/Max/Team plan.
Pin your Node.js version in .nvmrc so Claude always uses the same runtime as your project.
Run claude --version to confirm your install, then claude update to get the latest.
The ~/.claude/settings.json file sets your global defaults across all projects — set your preferred model there.
Use claude --print flag for non-interactive output — great for piping Claude's response to a file or another command.

practices.tip: Name your Skills with gerunds (WritingTests.md not tests.md) — Claude triggers them more reliably.
Put non-obvious architecture decisions in CLAUDE.md, not obvious ones. Claude already knows React — explain YOUR patterns.
practices.example: ## Why We Use Server Components\nWe avoid 'use client' unless absolutely necessary to maximize ISR caching.

practices.tip: Use deny: ["Bash(rm -rf*)", "Bash(sudo *)"] in settings.json to protect against accidental destructive commands.
Give agents the minimum tools they need. A code reviewer only needs Read, Glob, Grep — never Write access.
Run /compact before switching to a new task in the same session — saves 5k–20k tokens instantly.
practices.example: /compact "fixed the auth bug, now starting on payments"

practices.tip: Use @imports in CLAUDE.md to reference your schema files — Claude reads them automatically at session start.
Scope MCP filesystem servers to specific directories — never grant root access to an MCP server.

news.tip: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is now the recommended model for Claude Code — best coding performance on SWE-bench to date.
The Checkpoints feature lets you save session state with /checkpoint save and roll back instantly — no more lost work.
VS Code extension hit 100k+ installs in its first week — native inline diffs and sidebar chat now available.
OpusPlan mode auto-routes planning tasks to Opus and implementation to Sonnet — cutting costs 40–60% automatically.
The MCP Marketplace now has 100+ pre-built servers — install postgres, stripe, or puppeteer with one command.
Claude Code Security Scanner (preview) reasons about vulnerabilities like a human researcher — auto-suggests patches too.
The community awesome-claude-code-subagents repo has 3,000+ stars and 200+ ready-to-use agent definitions.
